title: Custom Item Merge
description: Merge item entity from any distance.
body:
# Custom Item Merge

Modify item entity merge distance to reduce CPU usage. Supports 1.17+.

## Configuration

Create or edit `<path to your minecraft directory>/config/c191239/custom-item-merge.txt` like this (below is the default configuration):
```
mergeX:5.0
mergeY:0.0
mergeZ:5.0
```

To apply your changes, run `/reload item-merge` with OP permission. This command can be auto-completed.
